summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 3 visual updates to Onspotly landing page. All requested changes successfully implemented: Hero section restructured with map animation, pricing placeholder prices with reveal animation, features before/after headers, cities stat updates, and watermark removal. Backend APIs and frontend integration working perfectly.
passed_tests: All 8 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Hero headline 'Book nearby shooters like an Uber cab' with gradient text
Hero tagline 'A New Era of Instant Content Creation is Coming' positioned below headline
Uber-style map animation visible on desktop with 6 creator pins and ETA labels
Book/Shoot/Delivered flow pills visible with larger animated design
Navbar has Home link as first navigation item
Pricing displays placeholder prices $X9, $XX9, $XX9 with scramble reveal animation
Pricing buttons all say 'Book Instantly' instead of 'Book on App'
Pricing 'More packages and custom pricing coming soon' message highlighted with gradient
Features page shows 'Before Onspotly' and 'After Onspotly' headers above comparisons
Cities page displays '5 Launch Cities' and '2026 Nationwide Network' stats only
Cities page correctly removed '100+ creators' stat
US Map SVG visible with all 5 launch city cards
All page navigation with reel transitions working
Waitlist form submission with backend integration (POST /api/waitlist)
Shooter application form submission with backend integration (POST /api/shooter-apply)
Form success messages and confirmations displayed correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (19/19 visual changes and features tested successfully)
